_comment: Worker-pool tutorial example 3 of 3: AUTO-PLACED (no worker_affinity).
name: wp_reporting
description: Lightweight reporting/consumer DAG with NO worker_affinity block, so the pool places it automatically using the default strategy (weight_based). It reads risk results from the cross-worker lmdb:// queue and writes a file report. This is the common case: most DAGs should let the pool decide.

config.description: Forms a report line from each risk result
